name: Hunter

abilities.name: Gutting Strike
abilities.desc: A strong melee attack that increases damage by 5. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Harrier's Guise
abilities.desc: Take on the aspect of the hawk, increasing attack power by 20 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Venom Barb
abilities.desc: Stings the target, dealing $d Nature damage over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Fell Shot
abilities.desc: An instant shot that deals $d Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Rattling Shot
abilities.desc: Dazes the target, slowing movement by 50% for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Counterfang
abilities.desc: Counterattack after the target dodges for weapon damage plus 12. Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Fettering Slash
abilities.desc: Inflicts a wound that slows the enemy by 40% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Wildbond
abilities.desc: Begins taming a beast to be your companion. It must be your level or lower and not an elite. Your pet follows you, attacks your enemies, and holds threat of its own. You may have one pet at a time.

abilities.name: Release Companion
abilities.desc: Releases your pet back to the wild.

abilities.name: Revive Pet
abilities.desc: Revives your dead pet and returns it to your side.

abilities.name: Marten's Guise
abilities.desc: Take on the aspect of the monkey, increasing your dodge chance by 8% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Courser's Guise
abilities.desc: Take on the aspect of the cheetah, increasing movement speed by 30% for 30 min.

abilities.name: Long Draw
abilities.desc: A carefully aimed shot that deals $d damage.

abilities.name: Fevered Draw
abilities.desc: Increases your attack speed by 40% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.desc: Rains arrows on the target area, dealing $d damage to enemies caught in it.

playbook: You are playing a Hunter (mana-based, ranged).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to ability range (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
